scope.selection_rule: Only assets from owned_repair_batch24/25 whose current helm_candidate.candidate_status is repaired_pending_judge_rerun.

verdicts.observed: Gold Jerusalem/potent cross-style Christian religious-building mark with compact symmetric arms and small terminal crosses.
verdicts.expected: Non-conspicuous Christian religious building should read as the brown/gold compact Christian cross witness, not as a generic building outline.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate preserves the religious-building class and improves the prior house/body substitution. Scale is larger than the OpenCPN witness but semantics are clear.

verdicts.observed: Black Jerusalem/potent cross-style Christian religious-building mark with compact symmetric arms and small terminal crosses.
verdicts.expected: Conspicuous Christian religious building should read as the black compact Christian cross witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate is a clear row-specific Christian cross and keeps the conspicuous/black distinction.

verdicts.observed: Magenta circled navigable lock-gate mark with internal opposed gate/leaf geometry.
verdicts.expected: Navigable lock gate should use the magenta circular lock-gate witness with internal gate leaves, not a generic gate or diamond.
verdicts.judge_comments: The internal geometry is stylized and heavier than the OpenCPN witness, but it reads as the intended navigable lock-gate class and preserves magenta.

verdicts.observed: Magenta circle with centered crossbar/plus lock-gate mark.
verdicts.expected: Non-navigable lock gate should match the magenta circle-plus witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate matches the reference class and color with acceptable Helm-style scaling.

verdicts.observed: Brown upright leaf/boat-outline shape with internal ribs.
verdicts.expected: Hulk should be the compact brown hulk silhouette from the reference, a low horizontal hull-like mark rather than an upright leaf or vessel profile.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate still changes the chart symbol into a decorative upright hull/leaf. It is visually pleasant, but the semantic shape does not match the HULKES01 witness.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw HULKES01 as the compact brown hulk silhouette from OpenCPN/S-52: low horizontal hull body, no upright leaf outline, no tree-like internal ribs.

verdicts.observed: Magenta information callout: cursor ring, diagonal leader, and boxed lowercase i.
verdicts.expected: Additional-information cursor mark should show the magenta leader from cursor point to an information box.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is clearly the INFORM01 callout and preserves the reference semantics.

verdicts.observed: Magenta IT letters, bold and compact.
verdicts.expected: Inshore traffic area symbol should read as the IT letter pair in magenta.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate preserves the symbol identity; style weight is acceptable.

verdicts.expected: Land as a point at small scale should be the tiny point/dot witness, not a target or ring.
verdicts.judge_comments: The outer ring invents a target-like symbol and changes the simple point semantics.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw LNDARE01 as a small point/dot marker matching the reference; remove the outer ring and bullseye treatment.

verdicts.observed: Large magenta A-shaped triangle with baseline.
verdicts.expected: Magnetic anomaly cursor pick at a point should be the small magenta wedge/vertical-line glyph from the witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate is still an A-letter/triangle substitute and does not match the magnetic-anomaly cursor glyph.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw LOCMAG01 as the reference magenta wedge/line glyph; remove the A-shaped triangle, crossbar, and baseline.

verdicts.observed: Large magenta A-shaped triangle with baseline.
verdicts.expected: Magnetic anomaly along a line/area should be the reference magenta wedge/line glyph variant.
verdicts.judge_comments: The same A-letter substitution remains and is not the LOCMAG51 witness shape.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw LOCMAG51 as the reference magenta magnetic-anomaly line/area wedge/line glyph; remove the A-shaped body and baseline.

verdicts.observed: Black diagonal contour/leader stroke with question-mark-like uncertainty cue.
verdicts.expected: Low-accuracy safety contour cue should be a black question mark plus diagonal line without invented endpoint ring.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is heavier and more icon-like than the witness, but it keeps the question/diagonal-line semantics and no longer includes the rejected endpoint ring.

verdicts.observed: Large magenta flag on a pole.
verdicts.expected: Magnetic variation point cursor should be the compact magenta filled wedge/vertical-line witness, not a generic flagpole icon.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate is closer than the old monogram, but it over-renders the witness as a flag with a pole and loses the tiny cursor-pick glyph proportions.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw MAGVAR01 as the compact filled magenta wedge with short vertical reference line matching OpenCPN; avoid a generic flag-on-pole silhouette.

verdicts.observed: Large magenta flag on a pole with baseline.
verdicts.expected: Magnetic variation line/area cursor should be the compact filled wedge/vertical-line witness variant.
verdicts.judge_comments: The generic flagpole treatment does not match the reference cursor glyph and risks confusing the row with a point/flag feature.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw MAGVAR51 as the compact magenta wedge/vertical-line line-or-area glyph from the reference; remove the flagpole/base icon treatment.

verdicts.observed: Gold rectangular marine-farm lattice with central oval and repeated posts.
verdicts.expected: Marine farm pattern should read as the gridded culture/farm witness with central oval/cage structure.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is larger and more stylized but preserves the marine-farm grid/cage semantics.

verdicts.observed: Gold monument/pylon shape with base ring.
verdicts.expected: Non-conspicuous monument should use the brown/gold monument witness silhouette.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate preserves the monument silhouette and non-conspicuous color distinction.

verdicts.observed: Black monument/pylon shape with base ring.
verdicts.expected: Conspicuous monument should use the black monument witness silhouette.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate preserves the conspicuous monument class and black color.

verdicts.observed: Orange north arrow with centered N below the arrowhead.
verdicts.expected: North arrow should clearly show an orange north-pointing arrow and N marker.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is simplified but preserves the north-arrow direction and label semantics.

verdicts.observed: Black concentric circle with filled center dot.
verdicts.expected: Conspicuous point position should be the circle-with-center-dot witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate matches the core point-feature mark with acceptable scaling.

verdicts.observed: Magenta warning triangle with exclamation mark.
verdicts.expected: Precautionary-area boundary should read as the magenta caution triangle/exclamation witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate preserves the warning-triangle class and magenta safety styling.
